context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures multi-chain indexing, selects the right ordering mode for cross-chain consistency, uses chain-aware env vars, distinguishes chains in handlers, and combines GraphQL with custom Hono routes.

checklist.name: Omnichain ordering
checklist.description: Config uses ordering: 'omnichain' since cross-chain consistency is required for bridge matching

checklist.name: Both chains configured
checklist.description: ponder.config.ts defines both mainnet (id: 1) and Base (id: 8453) in the chains object

checklist.name: Chain-specific RPC vars
checklist.description: Uses PONDER_RPC_URL_1 and PONDER_RPC_URL_8453 for the two chains (not generic names)

checklist.name: Chain distinction in handler
checklist.description: Handler uses context.chain.id to identify which chain an event came from

checklist.name: Correct startBlocks
checklist.description: Contract config sets startBlock per chain (18500000 for mainnet, 6800000 for Base), not 0

checklist.name: Hex for addresses
checklist.description: Schema uses t.hex() for sender and recipient address columns

checklist.name: Bigint for amount
checklist.description: Schema uses t.bigint() for the transfer amount column

checklist.name: Query indexes
checklist.description: Schema includes indexes on at least one of: sender, recipient, or chain ID columns

checklist.name: Custom Hono route
checklist.description: API file includes at least one custom Hono route (app.get) for the volume summary endpoint, separate from GraphQL

checklist.name: Read-only API db
checklist.description: API route imports db from 'ponder:api' (read-only) and does NOT use context.db or attempt writes

checklist.name: ABI as const
checklist.description: Bridge ABI file exports with `as const` assertion
